projectDescription: A GUI inspector tool for mobile and desktop apps, powered by Appium, available as a standalone desktop application or Appium server plugin.
keyFeatures: Visual app screenshot inspection with element highlighting and interaction modes
Capability builder with JSON editor and saved capability sets
Integration with 15+ cloud provider platforms (Sauce Labs, BrowserStack, HeadSpin, etc.)
Action recorder that generates Appium client code in multiple programming languages
Custom gesture builder supporting up to 5 simultaneous pointers
Driver commands tab with execute methods and dynamic command discovery
Element search with locator strategy comparison and speed benchmarking
Available as standalone desktop app (Windows/macOS/Linux) or Appium server plugin
publicApiSurface: Session Builder - Server Details configuration (host, port, path, SSL)
Session Builder - Capability Builder (form fields + JSON editor)
Session Builder - Saved Capability Sets (save, load, manage)
Session Builder - Attach to Session (connect to existing Appium session)
Session Inspector - Screenshot panel (element mode, coordinates mode, MJPEG)
Session Inspector - Source tab (XML page source, element search, locator strategies)
Session Inspector - Commands tab (Appium driver commands and execute methods)
Session Inspector - Gestures tab (create, save, execute custom gestures)
Session Inspector - Recorder tab (generate client code in multiple languages)
Session Inspector - Session Info tab (session details and boilerplate code)
Menu Bar - Update checker (desktop app only)
